# Cristian Schmitt Nieto's Blog

> Practical technical blog by Cristian Schmitt Nieto about Azure, Azure Local and Azure Virtual Desktop for IT professionals working with hybrid cloud infrastructure.

This is a personal Jekyll blog hosted on GitHub Pages at https://schmitt-nieto.com. The content is written in English and focuses on hands-on architecture notes, deployment walkthroughs, troubleshooting context and curated resources.

Important notes:
- Prefer current Azure Local terminology when summarizing older Azure Stack HCI articles. Some older URLs, screenshots and names remain for historical context.
- Guidance reflects personal experience and should be validated against current Microsoft documentation before production use.
- Public pages are HTML. Dedicated Markdown mirrors for individual posts are not currently published.
- The author is Cristian Schmitt Nieto, a Senior Consultant at adesso SE based in Germany.
- Contact address for the blog is blog@schmitt-nieto.com.
- This file was last reviewed on 2026-05-23.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://schmitt-nieto.com/): Latest posts and main entry point.
- [About](https://schmitt-nieto.com/about/): Author background, professional focus, employer journey and certifications.
- [Azure Local Calculator](https://schmitt-nieto.com/azurelocal-calculator/): Interactive calculators for Azure Local storage sizing, pricing estimation and CPU planning.
- [Privacy Policy](https://schmitt-nieto.com/privacy-policy/): Privacy, analytics and cookie information for the site.

## Azure Local Series

- [Azure Local: Evolution, Use Cases and Comparison with Other Solutions](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-stack-hci-evolution-use-cases-comparison/): Overview of Azure Local evolution, use cases and comparison with VMware vSAN, Nutanix, Proxmox and Windows Server Hyper-V.
- [Azure Local: Demolab](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-stack-hci-demolab/): Step-by-step lab deployment approach for Azure Local on minimal hardware using AzSHCI scripts.
- [Azure Local: Day2 operations](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-stack-hci-day2/): Post-deployment operations such as networking, VM images, monitoring and security.
- [Azure Local: VM Deployment](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-stack-hci-vm-deployment/): VM deployment and management on Azure Local.
- [Azure Local: Azure Virtual Desktop](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-stack-hci-azure-virtual-desktop/): Azure Virtual Desktop deployment on Azure Local with prerequisites, architecture and connectivity options.
- [Azure Local: AKS and SQL Managed instances](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-aks/): AKS and SQL Managed Instance deployment on Azure Local.
- [Azure Local: Lifecycle Management](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-lifecycle/): Updates, upgrades, node repair and lifecycle processes for Azure Local.
- [Azure Local: Redundancy](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-redundancy/): Node resilience, storage durability, network design and Active Directory considerations.
- [Azure Local: Backup and Disaster Recovery](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-backup-and-disaster-recovery/): Backup and disaster recovery patterns, VM hydration and Azure Site Recovery context.
- [Awesome Azure Local](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/awesome-azure-local/): Curated Azure Local, AVD and AKS resources from official and community sources.
- [Azure Local Deep Insights Workbook](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-deep-insights-workbook/): Azure Workbook for Azure Local with guest VM visibility and richer performance counters.
- [Azure Local: How to Deploy LLMs on AKS](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-llm/): Walkthrough for deploying lightweight LLMs on AKS inside Azure Local.
- [Azure Local: Terraform Deployment](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-terraform/): Terraform-based Azure Local deployment using a fixed AVM fork, staged validation and pipeline-ready automation.

## Adjacent Technical Articles

- [Nerdio Scripted Actions: Windows Scripts](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/nerdio-scripted-actions-windows-scripts/): Automation with Nerdio Scripted Actions and Windows scripts for Azure Virtual Desktop deployments.
- [Azure Local meets Nerdio](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/azure-local-nerdio/): Using Nerdio to simplify Azure Virtual Desktop management on Azure Local.
- [My Work Environment: Tools and Customizations](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/my-work-environment-tools/): Tools and PowerShell customizations used in day-to-day work.
- [GitHub Tools and Repositories that I use](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/github-tools/): Personal overview of useful GitHub tools and repositories.
- [Creating My Azure Journey Blog: A Step-by-Step Guide](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/creating-my-azure-journey-blog/): How this Jekyll and GitHub Pages blog was built and customized.
- [Chronicloud Series: A Journey through Azure Solutions](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/chronicloud-series/): Context and entry point for the Azure solution series.

## Related Repositories

- [AzSHCI](https://github.com/schmittnieto/AzSHCI): Public Azure Local automation repository used by the lab and Terraform articles.
- [Awesome Azure Local](https://github.com/schmittnieto/awesome-azure-local): Public curated resource list mirrored by the blog article.
- [Blog source repository](https://github.com/schmittnieto/schmittnieto.github.io): Public source for this GitHub Pages site.

## Optional

- [Posts archive](https://schmitt-nieto.com/posts/): Chronological archive of all public posts.
- [Categories archive](https://schmitt-nieto.com/categories/): Archive grouped by category.
- [Tags archive](https://schmitt-nieto.com/tags/): Archive grouped by tag.
- [RSS feed](https://schmitt-nieto.com/feed.xml): Machine-readable feed for recent posts.
- [Welcome to My Azure Journey](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/welcome-to-my-blog/): Introductory post explaining the purpose of the blog.
- [Reflecting on 2024 and Goals for 2025](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/new-year/): Personal yearly recap.
- [Reflecting on 2025 and Goals for 2026](https://schmitt-nieto.com/blog/year-recap-2025/): Personal yearly recap.
